requirement_topic.en: Norway NVE/Statnett Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 挪威NVE/Statnett并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 挪威NVE/Statnett併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Norway should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to NVE (Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate) regulatory oversight and Statnett grid codes for transmission-connected installations. Norway is an EEA member and applies EU law via the EEA Agreement; Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) is directly applicable in Norway for power-generating modules above national thresholds. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Norway's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Norway uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Norway is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Norway has cold-weather and high-humidity coastal conditions, particularly in western fjord areas and offshore environments, where commissioning files should document thermal management, corrosion resistance, and derating assumptions for the installed site.
summary.zh: 挪威并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受NVE（挪威水资源和能源理事会）监管及Statnett输电级接入电网规程约束。挪威为EEA成员，通过EEA协议适用欧盟法律；欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过国家阈值的发电模块在挪威直接适用。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对挪威230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。挪威与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：挪威为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。挪威尤其在西部峡湾地区及海上环境存在寒冷和高湿沿海条件，调试文件应记录安装现场的热管理、耐腐蚀性和降额假设。
summary.zht: 挪威併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受NVE（挪威水資源和能源理事會）監管及Statnett輸電級接入電網規程約束。挪威為EEA成員，通過EEA協議適用歐盟法律；歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過國家閾值的發電模組在挪威直接適用。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對挪威230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。挪威與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：挪威為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。挪威尤其在西部峽灣地區及海上環境存在寒冷和高濕沿海條件，調試文件應記錄安裝現場的熱管理、耐腐蝕性和降額假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 — Requirements for Generators (RfG), applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement
NVE grid-connection and project-acceptance requirements for the relevant installation
Statnett grid codes for transmission-connected and larger generation/storage installations
Norway low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Norway's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to NVE acceptance or Statnett grid-code compliance in Norway.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非挪威50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为NVE认可或Statnett电网规程合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非挪威50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為NVE認可或Statnett電網規程合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Norway NVE/Statnett project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Norway-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Norway voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For western Norway fjord/coastal sites and offshore environments, include cold-weather thermal performance, humidity, corrosion resistance, surge protection, and earthing assumptions in the project file.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代挪威NVE/Statnett项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、挪威专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称挪威电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于挪威西部峡湾/沿海现场和海上环境，项目文件应包括低温热性能、湿度、耐腐蚀性、浪涌保护和接地假设。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代挪威NVE/Statnett項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、挪威專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱挪威電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於挪威西部峽灣/沿海現場和海上環境，項目文件應包括低溫熱性能、濕度、耐腐蝕性、浪湧保護和接地假設。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through NVE regulatory oversight, Statnett grid codes for relevant installations, and RfG (EU 2016/631) requirements applicable via EEA Agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not an NVE/Statnett approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Norway 230/400 V

source.publisher: Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate (NVE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Norwegian NVE/Statnett grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Norway's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and document any coastal or mountain-site derating. Verify current NVE and Statnett project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足挪威NVE/Statnett并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为挪威230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并记录沿海或山地现场降额。出货或调试前请直接核实现行NVE和Statnett项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足挪威NVE/Statnett併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為挪威230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄沿海或山地現場降額。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行NVE和Statnett項目要求。
